titles.title: To rescue a sinner like me

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v3 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I don't understand, How a God so divine Could lower Himself to a life such as mine And consider me worth every minute of time To rescue a sinner like me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: When I think of my savior Alone on the cross I know without Him, that my life would be lost If we had not been willing to suffer the cost To rescue a sinner like me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: To rescue a sinner like me, Lord To rescue a sinner like me He abandoned His throne And His kingdom above To rescue a sinner like me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: My mind is so limited that I cannot see The reason He died and arose just for me So unworthy was I yet He gave willingly To rescue a sinner like me

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: To rescue a sinner as worthless as I And He gave me a reason to sing It's so hard to believe, but it happened to me Hallelujah, to Jesus my King, my King

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: A sinner like me A sinner like me
